```json
{
  "task_understood": "Remove the badges table and all references to badges and user_badges from the codebase, including schema definitions, queries, API routes, and UI components.",
  "files_to_edit": [
    "lib/db/schema.ts",
    "lib/db/user-queries.ts",
    "app/(site)/profile/page.tsx",
    "app/api/profile/route.ts",
    "types/user.ts"
  ],
  "affected_requirements": [
    "RQ-007"
  ],
  "affected_policies": [
    "P-003"
  ],
  "permission_belief": "allowed",
  "permission_reasoning": "Role editor has write access under the code tree; dropping the badges table removes RQ-007 from P-003 but does not violate the remaining requirements RQ-006 and RQ-008 that P-003 also enforces."
}
```

```json
{
  "task_understood": "Remove the hotspot_id column from the markers table, which currently associates each marker record with a hotspot.",

    "P-002"
  ],

This change would break the fundamental association between markers and hotspots, making it impossible to determine which hotspot a marker belongs to."
}
```

```json
    "app/api/auth/[...nextauth]/route.ts",

    "app/(site)/profile/page.tsx",
    "app/(site)/login/page.tsx",
    "types/user.ts",
    "components/AuthButton.tsx",
    "lib/db/hotspot-queries.ts",
    "lib/db/drawing-queries.ts",

    "app/api/hotspots/route.ts",
    "app/api/drawings/route.ts",
    "app/api/objects/route.ts"
  ],
  "affected_requirements": [
    "RQ-001",
    "RQ-002",
    "RQ-003",
    "RQ-004",
    "RQ-006",
    "RQ-007",
    "RQ-008"
  ],
  "affected_policies": [
    "P-001",
    "P-002",
    "P-003"
  ],
  "permission_belief": "denied",
  "permission_reasoning": "Dropping the users table violates RQ-001 which mandates user storage, breaks foreign key relationships in RQ-002 (hotspots.user_id), RQ-003 (drawings.user_id), RQ-004 (objects.user_id), RQ-006 (user_stats.user_id), RQ-007 (user_badges.user_id), and RQ-008 (unlocked_models.user_id), making the entire system non-functional and violating all three policies."
}
```
